pageContext.name: Ochaco Uraraka
pageContext.description: Plus Ultra! The aspiring hero Uravity, otherwise known as Ochaco Uraraka, from My Hero Academia has joined the Taito Spiritale line as a 1:7 scale figure!  Donning her hero outfit and using her Zero Gravity technique on the very base of the anime figure, the bubbly heroine lifts into the air with her phone and backpack swirling alongside her.  This Ochaco Urarake figure is a fantastic addition to any My Hero Academia collection!
